label: Update Module V2
info: Importable V2 module update trigger flow for dashboard -> MQTT.

name: Connect the same authenticated dashboard command stream you use for kiosk actions into the switch below. Wire output 1 to your Besiter MQTT out node and output 2 to your dashboard websocket response path.
Prepare Update Lookup
Resolve Kiosk For Update
Prepare direct module update
Output 1 -> existing MQTT out publishing Besiter receive topics
Output 2 -> existing websocket response / dashboard reply path
